(en)\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e*questionnaire, self-report, form, survey, PROM, PREM, PRO, diary, journal (en)\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003e*Use as a generic container to record information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient-generated from clinician-generated health data.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The scope of content for this archetype can be very broad and be inclusive of many contexts. The anticipated scope of content includes, but not limited to:\u0026#xD;\r","- self-generated responses to questionnaires, including PREMs or PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- pain or mood diary\u0026#xD;\r","- tobacco smoking diary\u0026#xD;\r","- self-generated health summary for sharing with others\u0026#xD;\r","- self-monitoring of measurements and observations\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The anticipated use of this archetype includes, but is not limited to:\u0026#xD;\r","- submission of a self-reported questionnaire to a clinician in advance of a planned contact\u0026#xD;\r","- submission of a contact request form\u0026#xD;\r","- daily measurements within a Personal Health Record\u0026#xD;\r","- patient-entered data in a shared clinical portal\u0026#xD;\r","- patient generated records of information from personal or medical devices\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The main Sections/Content component has been deliberately left unconstrained. This will allow it to be populated with any SECTION or ENTRY archetypes appropriate for the clinical purpose within a template. (en)\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003e*Not to be used to represent clinician-generated records. (en)\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003ede\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eEin Container für Informationen, die von einer Person bereitgestellt werden, um patientengenerierten von klinisch generierten Gesundheitsdaten zu unterscheiden.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eFragebogen, Selbstauskunft, Selbstbericht, Formular, Bogen, Umfrage, PROM, PREM, PRO, Tagebuch, Diary\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eZur Verwendung als genirischer Container zur Repräsentation von Informationen, die von einer Person bereitgestellt werden, um patientengenerierten von klinisch generierten Gesundheitsdaten zu unterscheiden.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Der inhaltliche Umfang dieses Archetyps kann sehr breit sein und viele Kontexte umfassen. Der erwartete Umfang des Inhalts umfasst, ist aber nicht beschränkt auf:\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","- selbst erstellte Antworten auf Fragebögen, einschließlich PREMs oder PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- Schmerz- oder Stimmungstagebuch\u0026#xD;\r","- Rauchertagebuch\u0026#xD;\r","- selbst erstellte Gesundheitszusammenfassung zum Teilen mit anderen\u0026#xD;\r","- Selbstüberwachung von Messungen und Beobachtungen\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Die erwartete Verwendung dieses Archetyps umfasst, ist aber nicht beschränkt auf:\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","- Abgabe eines selbstbeantworteten Fragebogens an einen Kliniker vor einem geplanten Kontakt\u0026#xD;\r","- Übermittlung eines Kontaktanfrageformulars\u0026#xD;\r","- tägliche Messungen innerhalb einer persönlichen Gesundheitsakte\u0026#xD;\r","- von Patienten eingegebene Daten in einem gemeinsam genutzten klinischen Portal\u0026#xD;\r","- Patientengenerierte Datensätze von Informationen von persönlichen oder medizinischen Geräten\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Die Hauptkomponente Sections/Content wurde absichtlich nicht eingeschränkt. Dadurch kann sie mit beliebigen SECTION- oder ENTRY-Archetypen gefüllt werden, die für den klinischen Zweck innerhalb eines Templates geeignet sind.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNicht zur Repräsentation von klinisch generierten Datensätzen verwenden.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003esv\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eEn behållare för information som tillhandahålls av en individ, för att möjliggöra tydlig åtskillnad mellan patientgenererad och klinikergenererad hälsoinformation. (eller hälsodata)\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003efrågeformulär,\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esjälvrapport\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eformulär\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eenkät\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePROM (Ska vi skriva ut förkortningen eller skriva den svenska översättningen? Patient Reported Outcome Measure (patientrapporterat utfallsmått ????)\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePREM (Ska vi skriva ut förkortningen eller skriva den svenska översättningen? PREM = Patient Reported Experience Measure. Finns flera översättningar på svenska förkortningen, patientrapporterat erfarenhetsmått, patientupplevelse, patientrapporterad mått.)\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePRO (PRO = Patient Reported Outcome (patientrapporterat utfall) Vi skulle kunna skriva ut, förkortningen PRO kanske inte är så vedertagen i Sverige?!)\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003edagbok\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ejournal\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eAnvänds som en generell behållare för att dokumentera information tillhandahållen av en individ, i syfte att möjliggöra en tydlig åtskillnad mellan patientgenererad och klinikergenererad hälsoinformation. (eller hälsodata)\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Innehållet i denna arketyp kan vara mycket brett och omfatta många olika sammanhang. Förväntat innehåll inkluderar, men är inte begränsat till:\u0026#xD;\r","- självrapporterade svar på frågeformulär, inklusive PREM eller PROM\u0026#xD;\r","- smärt- eller humördagbok\u0026#xD;\r","- dagbok över tobaksrökning\u0026#xD;\r","- självskapat hälsosammandrag för delning med andra (istället för självskapat- egengenererad, istället för hälsosammandrag- hälsosammanfattning)\u0026#xD;\r","- egenövervakning av mätvärden och observationer\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Förväntade användningsområden för denna arketyp inkluderar, men är inte begränsade till:\u0026#xD;\r","- inlämning av ett självrapporterat frågeformulär till en kliniker inför ett planerat vårdmöte\u0026#xD;\r","- inlämning av ett kontaktförfrågningsformulär\u0026#xD;\r","- dagliga mätningar i en personlig hälsodokumentation\u0026#xD;\r","- patientinmatade data i en delad klinisk portal (istället för patientinmatad- patientgenererad)\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Huvudsektionen/innehållsdelen har medvetet lämnats obegränsad för att möjliggöra ifyllnad med valfria SECTION- eller ENTRY-arketyper som är lämpliga för det kliniska syftet inom en mall.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eSka inte användas för att representera information genererad av hälso- och sjukvårdspersonal. (Istället för information- journalföring)\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003efi\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eHenkilön itse ilmoittamien tietojen säiliö, jonka käyttö tukee henkilön itse tuottamien tietojen selkeää erottamista sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilöiden tuottamista asiakastiedoista.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ekyselylomake, omaseuranta, lomake, kysely, PROM, PREM, PRO, päiväkirja, suunnitelma\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eKäytä geneerisenä säiliönä henkilön itse ilmoittamien tietojen tallentamiseen, jotta henkilön tuottamat tiedot voidaan erottaa selkeästi sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilöiden tuottamista asiakastiedoista. \u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Arkkityypin sisältö voi olla hyvin laaja ja sitä voidaan hyödyntää monissa eri käyttötapauksissa. Arkkityypin sisällön oletetaan koostuvan seuraavanlaisesta sisällöstä, vaikka sisällön ei tarvitse rajoittua näihin:\u0026#xD;\r","- itse tuotetut vastaukset kyselylomakkeisiin, mukaan lukien PREM- tai PROM-vastaukset\u0026#xD;\r","- kipu- tai mielialapäiväkirja\u0026#xD;\r","- tupakointipäiväkirja\u0026#xD;\r","- itse tuotettu terveysyhteenveto muiden kanssa jaettavaksi\u0026#xD;\r","- omat havainnot ja mittaustiedot\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Arkkityyppiä oletetaan käytettävän seuraavanlaisiin tarkoituksiin, mutta käytön ei tarvitse rajoittua näihin:\u0026#xD;\r","- itse tuotettujen kyselyiden tai testien lähettäminen sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon palvelunantajalle ennen kontaktia\u0026#xD;\r","- yhteydenottopyyntölomakkeen lähettäminen\u0026#xD;\r","- omien päivittäisten mittausten tai havaintojen raportointi\u0026#xD;\r","- henkilön syöttämät tiedot digitaaliseen palveluun\u0026#xD;\r","- itse tuotetut tiedot, jotka on tallennettu henkilökohtaisella laitteella tai lääkinnällisellä laitteella\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Arkkityypin sisältöä ei ole tarkoituksella rajoitettu, jotta on voitu mahdollistaa sen täydentäminen templaateissa kaikilla tarkoitukseen sopivilla SECTION- ja ENTRY-arkkityypeillä.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eEi tule käyttää sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilön tuottamien asiakastietojen tallentamiseen.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003ept\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eUm contentor para informações fornecidas por um indivíduo, para apoiar uma separação clara dos pacientes gerados a partir de dados de saúde gerados pelo médico.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003equestionário\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eauto-relatório\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eformulário\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003einquérito\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePROM\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePREM\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePRO\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ediário\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eUtilização como contentor genérico para registar informações fornecidas por um indivíduo, para apoiar uma separação clara entre os dados de saúde gerados pelo paciente e os dados de saúde gerados pelo médico.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","O âmbito do conteúdo deste arquétipo pode ser muito amplo e incluir muitos contextos. O âmbito de conteúdo previsto inclui, mas não se limita a:\u0026#xD;\r","- respostas auto-geradas a questionários, incluindo PREMs ou PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- diário da dor ou do humor\u0026#xD;\r","- diário de tabagismo\u0026#xD;\r","- resumo de saúde auto-gerada para partilha com outros\u0026#xD;\r","- auto-controlo das medições e observações\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","O uso antecipado deste arquétipo inclui, mas não está limitado a\u0026#xD;\r","- apresentação de um questionário autodeclarado a um clínico antes de um contacto planeado\u0026#xD;\r","- apresentação de um formulário de pedido de contacto\u0026#xD;\r","- medições diárias dentro de um Registo de Saúde Pessoal\u0026#xD;\r","- dados centrados no paciente num portal clínico partilhado\u0026#xD;\r","- registos de informação gerados pelo paciente a partir de dispositivos pessoais ou médicos\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","A componente principal das Secções/Conteúdo foi deliberadamente deixada sem constrangimentos. Isto permitirá que seja preenchida com qualquer arquétipo de SECÇÃO ou ENTRADA apropriado para o propósito clínico dentro de um modelo.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNão deve ser utilizado para representar registos gerados por clínicos.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003enb\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eEn container for informasjon gitt av et individ, for å kunne skille mellom data generert av pasienten og data generert av kliniker.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espørreskjema\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eselvrapportert\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eskjema\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espørreundersøkelse\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePROM\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePREM\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ePRO\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003edagbok\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ehelseopplysninger\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eBrukes som en container for informasjon gitt av et individ, for å kunne skille mellom data generert av pasienten og data generert av kliniker.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Innholdsomfanget for denne arketypen kan være svært bredt og være inkludert i mange kontekster. Det antatte innholdsomfanget inkluderer, men er ikke avgrenset til:\u0026#xD;\r","- selvgenererte svar på spørreskjemaer, inkludert PREMs eller PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- smerte- eller humørdagbok\u0026#xD;\r","- røykedagbok\u0026#xD;\r","- selvgenerert helsesammendrag som kan deles med andre\u0026#xD;\r","- selvmonotorering av målinger og observasjoner\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Den antatte bruken av denne arketypen inkluderer, men er ikke avgrenset til:\u0026#xD;\r","- innsending av selvrapporterte spørreskjema til en kliniker i forkant av en planlagt kontakt\u0026#xD;\r","- innsending av et skjema som kontaktforespørsel\u0026#xD;\r","- daglige målinger i en personlig helsejournal\u0026#xD;\r","- pasientens selvregistrerte data i en delt klinisk portal\u0026#xD;\r","- data registrert av pasienten fra personlig eller medisinsk utstyr\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Det er ikke satt begrensinger på hovedkomponenten Section/content. Dette gjør at man kan legge til hvilken som helst SECTION eller ENTRY arketype som er som passer til det kliniske formålet i templatet.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eSkal ikke brukes til å representere data generert av kliniker.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003een\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eA container for information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient generated from clinician-generated health data.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003equestionnaire, self-report, form, survey, PROM, PREM, PRO, diary, journal\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eUse as a generic container to record information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient-generated from clinician-generated health data.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The scope of content for this archetype can be very broad and be inclusive of many contexts. The anticipated scope of content includes, but not limited to:\u0026#xD;\r","- self-generated responses to questionnaires, including PREMs or PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- pain or mood diary\u0026#xD;\r","- tobacco smoking diary\u0026#xD;\r","- self-generated health summary for sharing with others\u0026#xD;\r","- self-monitoring of measurements and observations\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The anticipated use of this archetype includes, but is not limited to:\u0026#xD;\r","- submission of a self-reported questionnaire to a clinician in advance of a planned contact\u0026#xD;\r","- submission of a contact request form\u0026#xD;\r","- daily measurements within a Personal Health Record\u0026#xD;\r","- patient-entered data in a shared clinical portal\u0026#xD;\r","- patient generated records of information from personal or medical devices\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","The main Sections/Content component has been deliberately left unconstrained. This will allow it to be populated with any SECTION or ENTRY archetypes appropriate for the clinical purpose within a template.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNot to be used to represent clinician-generated records.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003eit\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eUn contenitore di informazioni fornite da un individuo, per supportare una chiara separazione tra i dati sanitari generati dal paziente e quelli generati dal clinico.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003equestionario, auto-segnalazione, modulo, indagine, PROM, PREM, PRO, diario, taccuino\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eUsare come contenitore generico per registrare informazioni fornite da un individuo, per supportare una chiara separazione tra i dati sanitari generati dal paziente e quelli generati dal clinico.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","L’ambito dei contenuti per questo archetipo può essere molto ampio e includere molti contesti. L’ambito previsto dei contenuti include, ma non è limitato a:\u0026#xD;\r","- risposte auto-generate a questionari, inclusi PREM o PROM\u0026#xD;\r","- diario del dolore o dell’umore\u0026#xD;\r","- diario sul fumo di tabacco\u0026#xD;\r","- resoconto sanitario auto-generato da condividere con altri\u0026#xD;\r","- automonitoraggio di misurazioni e osservazioni\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","L’uso previsto di questo archetipo include, ma non è limitato a:\u0026#xD;\r","- invio di un questionario auto-riportato a un clinico in anticipo rispetto a un contatto programmato\u0026#xD;\r","- invio di un modulo di richiesta di contatto\u0026#xD;\r","- misurazioni quotidiane all’interno di registro personale sanitario\u0026#xD;\r","- dati inseriti dal paziente in un portale clinico condiviso\u0026#xD;\r","- registrazioni generate dal paziente di informazioni provenienti da dispositivi personali o medici\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Il componente principale Sezioni/Contenuto è stato volutamente lasciato non vincolato. Ciò consentirà di compilarlo con qualsiasi archetipo SECTION o ENTRY appropriato per lo scopo clinico all’interno di un template.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNon deve essere utilizzato per rappresentare registrazioni generate dal clinico.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003efr\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eUn conteneur pour les informations fournies par un individu, pour bien distinguer entre des données de santé fournies par un patient et celles fournies par un clinicien.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003equestionnaire, auto-déclaration, formulaire, enquête, PROM, PREM, PRO, carnet, journal\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eCe conteneur est prévu pour enregistrer les informations fournies par un individu, pour bien distinguer entre des données de santé fournies par un patient et celles fournies par un clinicien. \u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Le cadre du contenu de cet archetype peut être très vaste et peut inclure de nombreux contextes. Le cadre prévu pour le contenu inclut (liste non exhaustive) :\u0026#xD;\r","- questionnaires auto-déclarés, dont des PREMs ou des PROMs\u0026#xD;\r","- journal de consigne pour les douleurs ou les humeurs\u0026#xD;\r","- journal de consommation de tabac\u0026#xD;\r","- résumé de l'état de santé auto-déclaré pour un partage avec autrui\u0026#xD;\r","- auto-surveillance d'observations et mesures\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Les usages prévus pour cet archetype incluent (liste non exhaustive) :\u0026#xD;\r","- soumission d'un questionnaire auto-déclaré à un clinicien en amont d'un contact prévu\u0026#xD;\r","- soumission d'un formulaire de demande de contact\u0026#xD;\r","- mesures quotidiennes dans un carnet de santé personnel\u0026#xD;\r","- données remplis par le patient dans un portail médical partagé\u0026#xD;\r","- données patient provenant d'appareil personnels ou d'appareil médicaux\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Les sections/contenus principaux sont volontairement sans contraintes. Cela permet de remplir le contenu avec tout archetype de type SECTION ou ENTRY adapté au besoin clinique d'un template.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNe pas utiliser pour représenter des enregistrements générés par un clinicien.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003ezh-cn\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003e针对个人所提供信息的容器，用于支持将患者产生型健康数据（patient generated health data，PGHD）与临床医务人员/临床医生产生型健康数据（clinician-generated health data，CGHD）明确地区分/分离开来。\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e问卷, 调查问卷, 自行报告, 自我报告, 表单, 表格, 调查, PROM, 患者报告型结局指标, 患者报告型效果指标, PREM, 患者报告型体验指标, PRO, 患者报告型效果, 日记, 日志\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003e作为通用的容器，用来记录个人所提供的信息，以支持将患者产生型健康数据与临床医务人员/临床医生产生型健康数据明确地区分/分离开来。\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","本原始型的内容范围可能非常广泛，并且可以包容很多的上下文背景/语境。预期的内容范围包括但不仅限于：\u0026#xD;\r","- 自行生成的对于问卷的回答，包括 PREM（Patient-Reported Experience Measure，患者报告型体验指标） 或 PROM（Patient‐Reported Outcome Measure，患者报告型结局/效果指标）\u0026#xD;\r","- 疼痛或情绪日记\u0026#xD;\r","- 吸烟日记\u0026#xD;\r","- 自行生成的健康摘要，用于与他人共享\u0026#xD;\r","- 对于种种观测项目和观察项目的自行监控/监测\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","本原始型的预期用途包括但不仅限于：\u0026#xD;\r","- 在已经计划的联系/接触之前，向临床医务人员/临床医生提交自行报告的问卷\u0026#xD;\r","- 提交联系申请表\u0026#xD;\r","- 个人健康档案（Personal Health Record，PHR）之中的日常观测结果\u0026#xD;\r","- 患者在共享型临床门户当中所输入的数据\u0026#xD;\r","- 患者生成的赋予来自个人或医疗设备的信息的记录\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","在此故意对其总的章节/内容（Sections/Content）构成要素不加约束。这样，在模板当中，就可以利用任何适合相应临床目的的章节型（SECTION）或条目型（ENTRY）原始型来对其加以填充。\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003e并非旨在用于表达临床医务人员/临床医生产生型的记录。\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003c/description\u003e\r"," \u003ctranslations\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003enn\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003c/translations\u003e\r"," \u003ctranslations\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," id=\"organisation\"\u003eMedizinische Hochschule Hannover\u003c/author\u003e\r"," \u003cauthor id=\"email\"\u003eStrauch.Natalia@mh-hannover.de\u003c/author\u003e\r"," \u003c/translations\u003e\r"," \u003ctranslations\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003esv\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cauthor id=\"name\"\u003eErik Sundvall, Marit Alice Venheim, Samira Nikman\u003c/author\u003e\r"," \u003cauthor id=\"organisation\"\u003eKarolinska Institutet + Karolinska University Hospital Region Stockholm + Linköping University, Helse Vest IKT, Karolinska Institutet + Karolinska University Hospital, Region (en)\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003epurpose\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003ekeywords\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;*questionnaire, self-report, form, survey, PROM, PREM, PRO, diary, journal (en)\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003ekeywords\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;*Use as a generic container to record information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient-generated from clinician-generated health data.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","The scope of content for this archetype can be very broad and be inclusive of many contexts. The anticipated scope of content includes, but not limited to:\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- self-generated responses to questionnaires, including PREMs or PROMs\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- pain or mood diary\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- tobacco smoking diary\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- self-generated health summary for sharing with others\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- self-monitoring of measurements and observations\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","The anticipated use of this archetype includes, but is not limited to:\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- submission of a self-reported questionnaire to a clinician in advance of a planned contact\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- submission of a contact request form\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- daily measurements within a Personal Health Record\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- patient-entered data in a shared clinical portal\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- patient generated records of information from personal or medical devices\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","The main Sections/Content component has been deliberately left unconstrained. This will allow it to be populated with any SECTION or ENTRY archetypes appropriate for the clinical purpose within a template. class=\"pl-ent\"\u003epurpose\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;Un conteneur pour les informations fournies par un individu, pour bien distinguer entre des données de santé fournies par un patient et celles Le cadre prévu pour le contenu inclut (liste non exhaustive) :\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- questionnaires auto-déclarés, dont des PREMs ou des PROMs\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- journal de consigne pour les douleurs ou les humeurs\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- journal de consommation de tabac\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- résumé de l\u0026#39;état de santé auto-déclaré pour un partage avec autrui\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- auto-surveillance d\u0026#39;observations et mesures\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Les usages prévus pour cet archetype incluent (liste non exhaustive) :\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- soumission d\u0026#39;un questionnaire auto-déclaré à un clinicien en amont d\u0026#39;un contact prévu\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- soumission d\u0026#39;un formulaire de demande de contact\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- mesures quotidiennes dans un carnet de santé personnel\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- données remplis par le patient dans un portail médical partagé\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- données patient provenant d\u0026#39;appareil personnels ou d\u0026#39;appareil médicaux\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Les sections/contenus principaux sont volontairement sans contraintes. data，CGHD）明确地区分/分离开来。\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003epurpose\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003ekeywords\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;问卷, 调查问卷, 自行报告, 自我报告, class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;作为通用的容器，用来记录个人所提供的信息，以支持将患者产生型健康数据与临床医务人员/临床医生产生型健康数据明确地区分/分离开来。\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","本原始型的内容范围可能非常广泛，并且可以包容很多的上下文背景/语境。预期的内容范围包括但不仅限于：\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 自行生成的对于问卷的回答，包括 PREM（Patient-Reported Experience Measure，患者报告型体验指标） 或 PROM（Patient‐Reported Outcome Measure，患者报告型结局/效果指标）\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 疼痛或情绪日记\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 吸烟日记\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 自行生成的健康摘要，用于与他人共享\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 对于种种观测项目和观察项目的自行监控/监测\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","本原始型的预期用途包括但不仅限于：\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 在已经计划的联系/接触之前，向临床医务人员/临床医生提交自行报告的问卷\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 提交联系申请表\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- 个人健康档案（Personal Health Record，PHR）之中的日常观测结果\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003emisuse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;并非旨在用于表达临床医务人员/临床医生产生型的记录。\u0026lt;/\u003cspan div.div: <other_contributors>Vebjørn Arntzen, Oslo University Hospital, Norway (openEHR Editor)</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Silje Ljosland Bakke, Helse Vest IKT AS, Norway (openEHR Editor)</other_contributors>

<purpose>*A container for information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient generated from clinician-generated health data. (en)</purpose>
<keywords>*questionnaire, self-report, form, survey, PROM, PREM, PRO, diary, journal (en)</keywords>
<use>*Use as a generic container to record information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient-generated from clinician-generated health data.
The scope of content for this archetype can be very broad and be inclusive of many contexts. The anticipated scope of content includes, but not limited to:
- self-generated responses to questionnaires, including PREMs or PROMs
- self-generated health summary for sharing with others
The anticipated use of this archetype includes, but is not limited to:
- submission of a self-reported questionnaire to a clinician in advance of a planned contact
- submission of a contact request form
- daily measurements within a Personal Health Record
- patient-entered data in a shared clinical portal
- patient generated records of information from personal or medical devices

The main Sections/Content component has been deliberately left unconstrained. This will allow it to be populated with any SECTION or ENTRY archetypes appropriate for the clinical purpose within a template. (en)</use>
<misuse>*Not to be used to represent clinician-generated records. (en)</misuse>
<purpose>Ein Container für Informationen, die von einer Person bereitgestellt werden, um patientengenerierten von klinisch generierten Gesundheitsdaten zu unterscheiden.</purpose>
<keywords>Fragebogen, Selbstauskunft, Selbstbericht, Formular, Bogen, Umfrage, PROM, PREM, PRO, Tagebuch, Diary</keywords>

<use>Zur Verwendung als genirischer Container zur Repräsentation von Informationen, die von einer Person bereitgestellt werden, um patientengenerierten von klinisch generierten Gesundheitsdaten zu unterscheiden.
Der inhaltliche Umfang dieses Archetyps kann sehr breit sein und viele Kontexte umfassen. Der erwartete Umfang des Inhalts umfasst, ist aber nicht beschränkt auf:
- selbst erstellte Antworten auf Fragebögen, einschließlich PREMs oder PROMs
- selbst erstellte Gesundheitszusammenfassung zum Teilen mit anderen
Die erwartete Verwendung dieses Archetyps umfasst, ist aber nicht beschränkt auf:
- Abgabe eines selbstbeantworteten Fragebogens an einen Kliniker vor einem geplanten Kontakt
- tägliche Messungen innerhalb einer persönlichen Gesundheitsakte
- von Patienten eingegebene Daten in einem gemeinsam genutzten klinischen Portal
- Patientengenerierte Datensätze von Informationen von persönlichen oder medizinischen Geräten

Die Hauptkomponente Sections/Content wurde absichtlich nicht eingeschränkt. Dadurch kann sie mit beliebigen SECTION- oder ENTRY-Archetypen gefüllt werden, die für den klinischen Zweck innerhalb eines Templates geeignet sind.</use>
<misuse>Nicht zur Repräsentation von klinisch generierten Datensätzen verwenden.</misuse>

<purpose>En behållare för information som tillhandahålls av en individ, för att möjliggöra tydlig åtskillnad mellan patientgenererad och klinikergenererad hälsoinformation. (eller hälsodata)</purpose>
<keywords>PROM (Ska vi skriva ut förkortningen eller skriva den svenska översättningen? Patient Reported Outcome Measure (patientrapporterat utfallsmått ????)</keywords>

<keywords>PREM (Ska vi skriva ut förkortningen eller skriva den svenska översättningen? PREM = Patient Reported Experience Measure. Finns flera översättningar på svenska förkortningen, patientrapporterat erfarenhetsmått, patientupplevelse, patientrapporterad mått.)</keywords>
<keywords>PRO (PRO = Patient Reported Outcome (patientrapporterat utfall) Vi skulle kunna skriva ut, förkortningen PRO kanske inte är så vedertagen i Sverige?!)</keywords>

<use>Används som en generell behållare för att dokumentera information tillhandahållen av en individ, i syfte att möjliggöra en tydlig åtskillnad mellan patientgenererad och klinikergenererad hälsoinformation. (eller hälsodata)
Innehållet i denna arketyp kan vara mycket brett och omfatta många olika sammanhang. Förväntat innehåll inkluderar, men är inte begränsat till:
- självrapporterade svar på frågeformulär, inklusive PREM eller PROM
- självskapat hälsosammandrag för delning med andra (istället för självskapat- egengenererad, istället för hälsosammandrag- hälsosammanfattning)
Förväntade användningsområden för denna arketyp inkluderar, men är inte begränsade till:
- inlämning av ett självrapporterat frågeformulär till en kliniker inför ett planerat vårdmöte
- dagliga mätningar i en personlig hälsodokumentation
- patientinmatade data i en delad klinisk portal (istället för patientinmatad- patientgenererad)
Huvudsektionen/innehållsdelen har medvetet lämnats obegränsad för att möjliggöra ifyllnad med valfria SECTION- eller ENTRY-arketyper som är lämpliga för det kliniska syftet inom en mall.</use>
<misuse>Ska inte användas för att representera information genererad av hälso- och sjukvårdspersonal. (Istället för information- journalföring)</misuse>

<purpose>Henkilön itse ilmoittamien tietojen säiliö, jonka käyttö tukee henkilön itse tuottamien tietojen selkeää erottamista sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilöiden tuottamista asiakastiedoista.</purpose>
<keywords>kyselylomake, omaseuranta, lomake, kysely, PROM, PREM, PRO, päiväkirja, suunnitelma</keywords>

<use>Käytä geneerisenä säiliönä henkilön itse ilmoittamien tietojen tallentamiseen, jotta henkilön tuottamat tiedot voidaan erottaa selkeästi sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilöiden tuottamista asiakastiedoista.

Arkkityypin sisältö voi olla hyvin laaja ja sitä voidaan hyödyntää monissa eri käyttötapauksissa. Arkkityypin sisällön oletetaan koostuvan seuraavanlaisesta sisällöstä, vaikka sisällön ei tarvitse rajoittua näihin:
- itse tuotetut vastaukset kyselylomakkeisiin, mukaan lukien PREM- tai PROM-vastaukset
- itse tuotettu terveysyhteenveto muiden kanssa jaettavaksi
Arkkityyppiä oletetaan käytettävän seuraavanlaisiin tarkoituksiin, mutta käytön ei tarvitse rajoittua näihin:
- itse tuotettujen kyselyiden tai testien lähettäminen sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon palvelunantajalle ennen kontaktia
- omien päivittäisten mittausten tai havaintojen raportointi
- itse tuotetut tiedot, jotka on tallennettu henkilökohtaisella laitteella tai lääkinnällisellä laitteella
Arkkityypin sisältöä ei ole tarkoituksella rajoitettu, jotta on voitu mahdollistaa sen täydentäminen templaateissa kaikilla tarkoitukseen sopivilla SECTION- ja ENTRY-arkkityypeillä.</use>
<misuse>Ei tule käyttää sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon ammattihenkilön tuottamien asiakastietojen tallentamiseen.</misuse>
<purpose>Um contentor para informações fornecidas por um indivíduo, para apoiar uma separação clara dos pacientes gerados a partir de dados de saúde gerados pelo médico.</purpose>

<use>Utilização como contentor genérico para registar informações fornecidas por um indivíduo, para apoiar uma separação clara entre os dados de saúde gerados pelo paciente e os dados de saúde gerados pelo médico.
O âmbito do conteúdo deste arquétipo pode ser muito amplo e incluir muitos contextos. O âmbito de conteúdo previsto inclui, mas não se limita a:
- respostas auto-geradas a questionários, incluindo PREMs ou PROMs
- diário da dor ou do humor
- resumo de saúde auto-gerada para partilha com outros
O uso antecipado deste arquétipo inclui, mas não está limitado a
- apresentação de um questionário autodeclarado a um clínico antes de um contacto planeado
- apresentação de um formulário de pedido de contacto
- medições diárias dentro de um Registo de Saúde Pessoal
- dados centrados no paciente num portal clínico partilhado
- registos de informação gerados pelo paciente a partir de dispositivos pessoais ou médicos

A componente principal das Secções/Conteúdo foi deliberadamente deixada sem constrangimentos. Isto permitirá que seja preenchida com qualquer arquétipo de SECÇÃO ou ENTRADA apropriado para o propósito clínico dentro de um modelo.</use>
<misuse>Não deve ser utilizado para representar registos gerados por clínicos.</misuse>
<purpose>En container for informasjon gitt av et individ, for å kunne skille mellom data generert av pasienten og data generert av kliniker.</purpose>
<use>Brukes som en container for informasjon gitt av et individ, for å kunne skille mellom data generert av pasienten og data generert av kliniker.
Innholdsomfanget for denne arketypen kan være svært bredt og være inkludert i mange kontekster. Det antatte innholdsomfanget inkluderer, men er ikke avgrenset til:
- selvgenererte svar på spørreskjemaer, inkludert PREMs eller PROMs
- selvgenerert helsesammendrag som kan deles med andre
Den antatte bruken av denne arketypen inkluderer, men er ikke avgrenset til:
- innsending av selvrapporterte spørreskjema til en kliniker i forkant av en planlagt kontakt
- innsending av et skjema som kontaktforespørsel
- daglige målinger i en personlig helsejournal
- pasientens selvregistrerte data i en delt klinisk portal
- data registrert av pasienten fra personlig eller medisinsk utstyr

Det er ikke satt begrensinger på hovedkomponenten Section/content. Dette gjør at man kan legge til hvilken som helst SECTION eller ENTRY arketype som er som passer til det kliniske formålet i templatet.</use>
<misuse>Skal ikke brukes til å representere data generert av kliniker.</misuse>
<purpose>A container for information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient generated from clinician-generated health data.</purpose>
<keywords>questionnaire, self-report, form, survey, PROM, PREM, PRO, diary, journal</keywords>
<use>Use as a generic container to record information provided by an individual, to support clear separation of patient-generated from clinician-generated health data.
The scope of content for this archetype can be very broad and be inclusive of many contexts. The anticipated scope of content includes, but not limited to:
- self-generated responses to questionnaires, including PREMs or PROMs
- self-generated health summary for sharing with others
The anticipated use of this archetype includes, but is not limited to:
- submission of a self-reported questionnaire to a clinician in advance of a planned contact
- submission of a contact request form
- daily measurements within a Personal Health Record
- patient-entered data in a shared clinical portal
- patient generated records of information from personal or medical devices

The main Sections/Content component has been deliberately left unconstrained. This will allow it to be populated with any SECTION or ENTRY archetypes appropriate for the clinical purpose within a template.</use>
<misuse>Not to be used to represent clinician-generated records.</misuse>
<purpose>Un contenitore di informazioni fornite da un individuo, per supportare una chiara separazione tra i dati sanitari generati dal paziente e quelli generati dal clinico.</purpose>
<keywords>questionario, auto-segnalazione, modulo, indagine, PROM, PREM, PRO, diario, taccuino</keywords>

<use>Usare come contenitore generico per registrare informazioni fornite da un individuo, per supportare una chiara separazione tra i dati sanitari generati dal paziente e quelli generati dal clinico.
L’ambito dei contenuti per questo archetipo può essere molto ampio e includere molti contesti. L’ambito previsto dei contenuti include, ma non è limitato a:
- risposte auto-generate a questionari, inclusi PREM o PROM
- resoconto sanitario auto-generato da condividere con altri
L’uso previsto di questo archetipo include, ma non è limitato a:
- invio di un questionario auto-riportato a un clinico in anticipo rispetto a un contatto programmato
- invio di un modulo di richiesta di contatto
- misurazioni quotidiane all’interno di registro personale sanitario
- dati inseriti dal paziente in un portale clinico condiviso
- registrazioni generate dal paziente di informazioni provenienti da dispositivi personali o medici

Il componente principale Sezioni/Contenuto è stato volutamente lasciato non vincolato. Ciò consentirà di compilarlo con qualsiasi archetipo SECTION o ENTRY appropriato per lo scopo clinico all’interno di un template.</use>
<misuse>Non deve essere utilizzato per rappresentare registrazioni generate dal clinico.</misuse>
<purpose>Un conteneur pour les informations fournies par un individu, pour bien distinguer entre des données de santé fournies par un patient et celles fournies par un clinicien.</purpose>
<keywords>questionnaire, auto-déclaration, formulaire, enquête, PROM, PREM, PRO, carnet, journal</keywords>
<use>Ce conteneur est prévu pour enregistrer les informations fournies par un individu, pour bien distinguer entre des données de santé fournies par un patient et celles fournies par un clinicien.
Le cadre du contenu de cet archetype peut être très vaste et peut inclure de nombreux contextes. Le cadre prévu pour le contenu inclut (liste non exhaustive) :
- questionnaires auto-déclarés, dont des PREMs ou des PROMs
- journal de consigne pour les douleurs ou les humeurs
- résumé de l'état de santé auto-déclaré pour un partage avec autrui
Les usages prévus pour cet archetype incluent (liste non exhaustive) :
- soumission d'un questionnaire auto-déclaré à un clinicien en amont d'un contact prévu
- soumission d'un formulaire de demande de contact
- mesures quotidiennes dans un carnet de santé personnel
- données remplis par le patient dans un portail médical partagé
- données patient provenant d'appareil personnels ou d'appareil médicaux
Les sections/contenus principaux sont volontairement sans contraintes. Cela permet de remplir le contenu avec tout archetype de type SECTION ou ENTRY adapté au besoin clinique d'un template.</use>
<misuse>Ne pas utiliser pour représenter des enregistrements générés par un clinicien.</misuse>
<purpose>针对个人所提供信息的容器，用于支持将患者产生型健康数据（patient generated health data，PGHD）与临床医务人员/临床医生产生型健康数据（clinician-generated health data，CGHD）明确地区分/分离开来。</purpose>
<keywords>问卷, 调查问卷, 自行报告, 自我报告, 表单, 表格, 调查, PROM, 患者报告型结局指标, 患者报告型效果指标, PREM, 患者报告型体验指标, PRO, 患者报告型效果, 日记, 日志</keywords>
<use>作为通用的容器，用来记录个人所提供的信息，以支持将患者产生型健康数据与临床医务人员/临床医生产生型健康数据明确地区分/分离开来。
本原始型的内容范围可能非常广泛，并且可以包容很多的上下文背景/语境。预期的内容范围包括但不仅限于：
- 自行生成的对于问卷的回答，包括 PREM（Patient-Reported Experience Measure，患者报告型体验指标） 或 PROM（Patient‐Reported Outcome Measure，患者报告型结局/效果指标）
- 自行生成的健康摘要，用于与他人共享
- 对于种种观测项目和观察项目的自行监控/监测
本原始型的预期用途包括但不仅限于：
- 在已经计划的联系/接触之前，向临床医务人员/临床医生提交自行报告的问卷
- 个人健康档案（Personal Health Record，PHR）之中的日常观测结果
- 患者在共享型临床门户当中所输入的数据
- 患者生成的赋予来自个人或医疗设备的信息的记录
在此故意对其总的章节/内容（Sections/Content）构成要素不加约束。这样，在模板当中，就可以利用任何适合相应临床目的的章节型（SECTION）或条目型（ENTRY）原始型来对其加以填充。</use>
<misuse>并非旨在用于表达临床医务人员/临床医生产生型的记录。</misuse>
<author id="name">Erik Sundvall, Marit Alice Venheim, Samira Nikman</author>

<author id="organisation">Karolinska Institutet + Karolinska University Hospital Region Stockholm + Linköping University, Helse Vest IKT, Karolinska Institutet + Karolinska University Hospital, Region Stockholm + Linköping University</author>
<author id="organisation">Helse Vest IKT, Oslo University Hospital</author>
<items id="description">Generic container for information provided by an individual.</items>
<items id="description">Additional information required to capture local content or to align with other reference models/formalisms.</items>
<items id="comment">For example: local information requirements or additional metadata to align with FHIR.</items>
<items id="description">To capture the device used to report data.</items>
<items id="description">About one or more source types for the information contained in the report.</items>
<items id="comment">This data element may be used when the Information source is different to the author or composer. For example: 'parent'; or 'carer'.</items>
<items id="description">Generisk container for informasjon gitt av et individ.</items>
<items id="description">Ytterligere informasjon som er nødvendig for å registrere lokalt innhold/kontekst, eller for å sammenstille med andre referansemodeller/formalismer.</items>
<items id="comment">For eksempel lokale informasjonsbehov eller ytterligere metadata for å kunne tilpasse til tilsvarende konsepter i FHIR.</items>
<items id="description">For legge til enheten som brukes til å rapportere data.</items>
<items id="description">Om en eller flere typer kilde for informasjonen i rapporten.</items>
<items id="comment">Dette dataelementet kan brukes når informasjonskilden er forskjellig fra forfatteren. For eksempel: "forelder" eller "omsorgsperson".</items>
<items id="description">*Generic container for information provided by an individual. (en)</items>
<items id="description">*Additional information required to capture local content or to align with other reference models/formalisms. (en)</items>
<items id="comment">*For example: local information requirements or additional metadata to align with FHIR. (en)</items>
<items id="description">*To capture the device used to report data. (en)</items>
<items id="description">*About one or more source types for the information contained in the report. (en)</items>
<items id="comment">*This data element may be used when the Information source is different to the author or composer. For example: 'parent'; or 'carer'. (en)</items>
<items id="description">En generisk behållare för information tillhandahållen av en individ.</items>
<items id="description">Ytterligare information som krävs för att fånga lokalt innehåll eller för att anpassa till andra referensmodeller eller formella krav.</items>
<items id="comment">Exempelvis lokala informationskrav eller ytterligare metadata för att anpassa till FHIR.</items>
<items id="description">För att ange vilken utrustning som användes för att rapportera data.</items>
<items id="description">Om en eller flera källtyper för informationen i rapporten.</items>
<items id="comment">Detta dataelement kan användas när informationskällan skiljer sig från författaren eller den som registrerat uppgifterna. Till exempel: "förälder" eller "vårdgivare".</items>
<items id="description">Generischer Container für Informationen, die von einer Person bereitgestellt werden.</items>
<items id="description">Zusätzliche Informationen zur Erfassung lokaler Inhalte oder Anpassung an andere Referenzmodelle/Formalismen.</items>
<items id="comment">Zum Beispiel: Lokaler Informationsbedarf oder zusätzliche Metadaten zur Anpassung an FHIR-Ressourcen.</items>
<items id="description">Um das Gerät zu erfassen, das zum Berichten von Daten verwendet wird.</items>
<items id="description">Über eine oder mehrere Arten von Quelle für die im Bericht enthaltenen Informationen.</items>
<items id="comment">Dieses Datenelement kann verwendet werden, wenn sich die Informationsquelle vom Autor oder Verfasser unterscheidet. Zum Beispiel: "Elternteil" oder „Betreuer“.</items>
<items id="description">Conteneur générique pour des informations fournies par un individu.</items>
<items id="description">Informations supplémentaires requises pour la collecte locale du contenu ou pour l'alignement avec d'autres référentiels ou formalismes.</items>
<items id="comment">Par exemple: exigences locales d'informations ou méta-données supplémentaires pour l'alignement avec FHIR.</items>
<items id="description">Appareil utilisé pour la collecte des données.</items>
<items id="description">A propos d'un ou plusieurs types de sources pour les informations contenues dans le rapport.</items>
<items id="comment">Ces éléments de données peuvent être utilisées lorsque la source d'information est différente de l'auteur ou du rédacteur. Par exemple: 'parent' ou 'soignant'.</items>
<items id="description">Contentor genérico para informação fornecida por um indivíduo.</items>
<items id="description">Informação adicional necessária para captar conteúdos locais ou para alinhar com outros modelos/formalismos de referência.</items>
<items id="comment">Por exemplo: requisitos de informação local ou metadados adicionais para alinhar com FHIR.</items>
<items id="description">Para capturar o dispositivo utilizado para reportar dados.</items>
<items id="description">Sobre um ou mais tipos de fontes para a informação contida no relatório.</items>
<items id="comment">Este elemento de dados pode ser utilizado quando a fonte de informação é diferente da do autor ou compositor. Por exemplo: 'progenitor'; ou 'cuidador'.</items>
<items id="description">Geneerinen säiliö henkilön itse ilmoittamille tiedoille.</items>
<items id="description">Lisätiedot, joita tarvitaan paikallisen asiayhteyden kirjaamiseksi tai yhtenäistämiseksi muiden viitemallien tai formalismien kanssa.</items>
<items id="comment">Esimerkiksi: paikalliset tietovaatimukset tai FHIR:n mukaiset metatiedot.</items>
<items id="description">Tietoja yhdestä tai useammasta raportin sisältämien tietojen lähdetyypeistä.</items>
<items id="comment">Tätä tietoelementtiä voidaan käyttää, kun tietolähde on eri kuin tiedon kirjaaja. Esimerkiksi: 'vanhempi'; tai 'hoitaja'.</items>
<items id="description">针对个人所提供信息的容器。又可称为“自我报告的数据”</items>
<items id="description">采集本地内容或者是与其他参考模型/形式化体系保持一致时所需的其他信息。</items>
<items id="comment">本地信息要求/需求，或者是与 FHIR 保持一致时所需的其他元数据。</items>
<items id="description">旨在采集/记录用来报告数据的设备。</items>
<items id="description">关于报告之中所包含信息的一个或多个来源类型。</items>
<items id="comment">当信息来源不同于作者/编纂者或创作者时（如“患者”或“[非正规]照护人员”），可以使用本数据元。</items>
<items id="description">Contenitore generico per informazioni fornite da un individuo.</items>
<items id="description">Informazioni aggiuntive richieste per registrare contenuti locali o per allinearsi ad altri modelli/formalismi di riferimento.</items>
<items id="comment">*For example: local information requirements or additional metadata to align with FHIR.(en)</items>
<items id="description">Per registrare il dispositivo utilizzato per riportare i dati.</items>
<items id="description">Riguarda uno o più tipi di fonte delle informazioni contenute nel referto.</items>
<items id="comment">*This data element may be used when the Information source is different to the author or composer. For example: 'parent'; or 'carer'.(en)</items>
